dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6474 IH: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to expand the meaning and eligibility of energy communities for purposes of the increased renewable electricity production and increased clean electricity investment credit rates.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Newhouse (for himself, Mr. Fleischmann, and Ms. Tenney) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to expand the meaning and eligibility of energy communities for purposes of the increased renewable electricity production and increased clean electricity investment credit rates.

section.header: Expansion of meaning and eligibility of energy communities for purposes of increased renewable electricity production and increased clean electricity investment credit rates

subsection.header: Increased renewable electricity production credit rate
subsection.text: Section 45(b)(11)(B)(iv) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by inserting or non-metropolitan statistical area after a metropolitan statistical area.

subsection.header: Increased clean electricity investment credit rate
subsection.text: Section 48E(a)(3)(A)(i) of such Code is amended by striking , as applied without regard to clause (iv) thereof.

paragraph.header: Increased renewable electricity production credit rate
paragraph.text: The amendment made by subsection (a) shall take effect as if included in section 70512(f)(1) of Public Law 119–21.

paragraph.header: Increased clean electricity investment credit rate
paragraph.text: The amendment made by subsection (b) shall take effect as if included in section 70512(f)(2) of Public Law 119–21.
